Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

    controlPersonCompanySymbols(String controlPersonCompanySymbols)
    A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team

  • Method Details

    • accreditedInvestor

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder accreditedInvestor(boolean accreditedInvestor)
      Indicates whether the person is an accredited investor. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • accreditedInvestor

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder accreditedInvestor(Optional<Boolean> accreditedInvestor)
      Indicates whether the person is an accredited investor. By default, this is set to `false`.

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder citizenshipCountries(List<String> citizenshipCountries)

      A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team

    • customerIdentificationId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder customerIdentificationId(String customerIdentificationId)
      Customer identification id returned by the customer identification service which represents a single instance of an identity verification outcome for the specified customer. This verification result will be used as part of the full investigation.

    • customerIdentificationId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder customerIdentificationId(Optional<String> customerIdentificationId)
      Customer identification id returned by the customer identification service which represents a single instance of an identity verification outcome for the specified customer. This verification result will be used as part of the full investigation.

    • foreignIdentification

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder foreignIdentification(PartyForeignIdentification foreignIdentification)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `irs_form_type` is `W_8BEN`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder identityVerificationResult(PartyIdentityVerificationResult identityVerificationResult)

    • personalAddress

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder personalAddress(PartyPersonalAddress personalAddress)
      The legal street number and street name for an account Party. Required fields within the `personal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • personalAddress

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder personalAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyPersonalAddress> personalAddress)
      The legal street number and street name for an account Party. Required fields within the `personal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • taxId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxId(String taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • taxId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxId(Optional<String> taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • taxIdLastFour

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxIdLastFour(String taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • taxIdLastFour

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxIdLastFour(Optional<String> taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • taxIdType

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxIdType(PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxIdType taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • taxIdType

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxIdType(Optional<? extends PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxIdType> taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxProfile(PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile taxProfile)

    • taxProfile

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder taxProfile(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile> taxProfile)
      Tax-related attributes at the for the account; A tax profile with taxpayer attributes is located on the legal_natural_person or legal_entity objects elsewhere on the account record.

    • build

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson build()
